milestones.title: Phase 1 - World/Persona Modeling
milestones.description: Produce a stable, evidence-backed world model and persona layer for the Fog Harbor demo.

milestones.title: Phase 2 - Scenario/Simulation Loop
milestones.description: Stabilize baseline/intervention simulation, trace, report, and eval loops.

milestones.title: Phase 3 - Eval/UI/Demo
milestones.description: Finish the workbench, final demo loop, and review-grade presentation layer.

labels.name: phase:1
labels.description: Phase 1 world and persona modeling work.

labels.name: phase:3
labels.description: Phase 3 UI, eval, and demo work.

labels.name: area:backend
labels.description: Backend, CLI, contracts, or artifact pipeline work.

labels.name: area:docs-evals
labels.description: Docs, ADRs, rubrics, or eval-harness work.

labels.name: risk:core-contract
labels.description: Touches protected-core contracts and cannot auto-merge.

labels.name: risk:safety
labels.description: Touches safety, redlines, or policy boundaries.

labels.name: risk:ci
labels.description: Touches CI, automation, or workflow reliability.

labels.name: lane:auto-safe
labels.description: Eligible for autonomous safe-lane execution and merge.

labels.name: lane:protected-core
labels.description: Protected-core lane; may be automated but must not auto-merge.

labels.name: status:ready
labels.description: Ready for Codex triage or execution.

labels.name: status:blocked
labels.description: Blocked and should not be picked by builder automation.

labels.name: status:needs-adr
labels.description: Needs an ADR or contract decision before merge.

issues.title: Day 0 bootstrap: create a clean automation baseline
issues.body:
## goal
Create the clean baseline required before long-running automation can write code or auto-merge.

## input
- Current dirty main worktree
- Existing Phase 0/Phase 1 repo state
- Automation plan in docs/plans/automation-roadmap.md

## output
- A clean baseline snapshot or baseline PR
- Confirmed milestones and label taxonomy
- CI upgraded from phase0-only checks to long-running automation gates

## out-of-scope
- Building new product features
- Expanding the simulation contract

## minimal test
- `git -c safe.directory=D:/mirror status --short`
- `./make.ps1 test`
- `./make.ps1 eval-demo`

## touches contract
Yes. This work changes automation governance and merge policy.

## phase
Phase 1 bootstrap gate

issues.title: Phase 1 exit gate
issues.body:
## goal
Validate that all Phase 1 exit criteria are met before automation advances to Phase 2.

## input
- Current artifacts/demo outputs
- Current Phase 1 milestone state
- ADR and contract notes

## output
- Phase audit summary
- Gap issues if anything is missing
- Go/no-go decision for Phase 2

## out-of-scope
- Implementing new features unrelated to exit criteria

## minimal test
- `python -m backend.app.cli audit-phase phase1`

## touches contract
Yes. Exit gating can block or permit phase progression.

## phase
Phase 1

issues.title: Phase 2 exit gate
issues.body:
## goal
Verify Phase 2 exit criteria before the automation system opens Phase 3.

## input
- run/report/eval artifacts
- open protected-core PR state
- milestone completion state

## output
- phase audit summary
- explicit go/no-go decision
- follow-up gap issues when needed

## out-of-scope
- new scenario work beyond unmet criteria

## minimal test
- `python -m backend.app.cli audit-phase phase2`

## touches contract
Yes. Exit gates are protected-core.

## phase
Phase 2

issues.title: Phase 3 exit gate
issues.body:
## goal
Confirm that all blueprint Phase 3 criteria are satisfied and the automation system can pause permanently.

## input
- final artifacts and frontend workbench
- current milestone and PR state
- human review rubric output

## output
- final completion report
- PAUSED automation state
- documented stop condition

## out-of-scope
- follow-on enterprise productization

## minimal test
- `python -m backend.app.cli audit-phase phase3`

## touches contract
Yes. This issue controls the project stop condition.

## phase
Phase 3
